description: Square, high-contrast black-and-white arrest card from ICE. The background is a tightly cropped grayscale photograph of a pair of handcuffed hands wrapped in chains. Overlaid typography in the upper left, in pale cyan all-caps sans-serif, reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL', with a smaller white subhead '1/26/2025 | Dallas, Texas'. Below, in large white type, the name is stacked across four lines: 'Jeering Alcides Godoy Linares'. Beneath that a white label 'CRIMES:' is followed by a bulleted list: 'Assault' and 'Evading arrest'. The circular Department of Homeland Security seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark are at the bottom left. A red diagonal banner in the lower-right corner reads 'DALLAS' in white.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/26/2025 | Dallas, Texas; Jeering Alcides Godoy Linares; CRIMES: Assault, Evading arrest; DALLAS; ICE
